localized_texts.text: Langkawi Sunset Cruise Experience

Indulge in the romance of a Langkawi sunset, and make your holiday truly special with sunset cruise that guarantees to create cherished memories for you, your family, or your romantic partner. This exceptional cruise offers an intimate exploration of Langkawi's captivating sights, ensuring a truly unforgettable experience. Reserve your spot now and let the magic unfold on the waters of Langkawi.
Witness the sun setting over the serene Andaman Sea as you savor a delightful dinner aboard a yacht
Immerse yourself in the saltwater jacuzzi, equipped with a trawling net attached to the boat's side for safety
Indulge in a set meal accompanied by a refreshing drink and take a refreshing dip in the water while cruising along the sea

This cruise promises an intimate exploration of the enchanting sights this locale has to offer. Delight in an authentic Malaysian dinner as the evening unfolds, casting its warm glow over the island's picturesque bay. Immerse yourself in the magical ambiance as lights illuminate the bay during this sunset dinner cruise. Indulge in a delectable set meal featuring a variety of dishes, including delightful seafood and local specialties.
Even if food and drinks are included, some cruises may have a cash bar or offer souvenirs for purchase.
Some cruises may offer time for swimming, so bring a swimsuit and towel if interested.
What’s included: Use of all facilities
What’s included: Shower room
What’s included: Insurance provided by the operator
What’s included: Sunset cruise experience
What’s included: 1 On-board meal [Muslim Friendly]
What’s included: Free flow non-alcoholic drink
What’s included: Jacuzzi net experience (subject to availability)
What’s included: English-speaking guide
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter

How to use: After booking, kindly provide a photocopy of each traveller’s Passport or Mykad via email accounts@hi5marketing.com.my or WhatsApp (+6017 6906905) for issuance of Insurance (Insurance is mandatory for this experience)
How to use: Kindly provide all documents one-day in advance before 18:00 once booking is confirmed.
How to use: Any documents submitted later than the mentioned time will impose penalty fees (charges varies depending on the booked packages). This applies to booking made after 18:00 as well.

Terms & Conditions: Ticket is valid for selected date only Every pax, including infants, children, and adults, must have a valid ticket. Infants must be selected and declared at the time of booking for insurance coverage purposes. Customer cannot choose type of cruise Customer not allowed to bring own food/beverages on board After booking, kindly provide a photocopy of each traveller’s Passport or Mykad via email accounts@hi5marketing.com.my or WhatsApp (+6017 6906905) for issuance of Insurance (Insurance is mandatory for this experience) Kindly be informed that there will be additional charge ranging from MYR 35 to MYR 60 for same day booking. Payment is to be made directly to the operator. Kindly provide all documents one-day in advance before 18:00 once booking is confirmed. Any documents submitted later than the mentioned time will impose penalty fees (charges varies depending on the booked packages). This applies to booking made after 18:00 as well. Important: Infants and children must be included in the passenger headcount Infant aged 0-1 can join this activity free of charge Children aged 2-12 will be charged as child rate Children aged 0-12 must be accompanied by a paying adult Anyone can join the program, including non-swimmers Please indicate meal restriction at the check out page This activity is not recommended for anyone with certain medical conditions such as high blood pressure, epilepsy, etc. This activity is not recommended for anyone with impaired physical mobility This activity is not stroller and wheelchair-accessible The menu might change depending on the season and availability of ingredients The schedule might change depending on traffic and weather conditions If you are prone to motion sickness, we strongly recommend you take travel sickness tablets 4 hour(s) before the activity time The cruise photo shown on the page is for reference purposes. Boat type will be assigned based on availability, and specific requests cannot be accommodated
Cancellation Policy: Free cancellation if cancelled 336 hours before the selected date.
What’s included: Round-trip transfers to and from your hotel
What’s included: 4-hours tour
What’s included: Non-alcoholic drinks
What’s included: 10-minute duration of kayak (subject to availability)
What’s included: 10-minute duration of paddle board (subject to availability)
What’s included: Open sea swimming
What’s included: Life jacket
What’s included: NO MEAL (own halal food allowed)

Terms & Conditions: This ticket must be purchase with main ticket Personal belongings should not be taken into the sea. You are fully responsible for the safety of your belongings. A life jacket is mandatory. Regardless of your swimming ability, please adhere to our safety regulations to ensure your comfort and well-being. Always hold on tightly during rides and listen to the instructions provided by our marshals at all times. Any unused tickets/activities will not be refunded and cannot be carried forward to another day nor can it be transfered to another person. We have crew to take photo/drone videos for you. Please shout out to them if you have any special request, we will try our very best to accommodate you. Please note that we reserve the right to refuse service if we determine that a guest is excessively intoxicated. No refunds will be provided in such cases.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
